subject: A large dark dragon breathes a torrent of fire directly onto a figure who is being consumed by the flames
description: A massive dark-scaled dragon occupies the left and upper portion of the frame, its neck arched downward as it unleashes a concentrated stream of fire from its open jaws. The flames engulf a figure on the right side of the image entirely — the target is fully consumed by orange and white fire, body silhouette still faintly visible within the blaze. The background is a mountainous grey landscape. The dragon's body is deep charcoal, its eyes gold, contrasting sharply with the brilliant orange and white of the fire. The composition is a diagonal clash from upper-left to lower-right.
foreground: fire engulfing a figure, rocky ground
